nodes.name: WebGLRendererCore.setDynamicLight

nodes.name: WebGLRendererCore.setLightBounds

nodes.name: octile
nodes.signature: fn octile(ax: u32, ay: u32, bx: u32, by: u32) -> f32
nodes.doc: Octile heuristic: `dx + dy + (√2 - 2) * min(dx, dy)` with unit cost = 1. Admissible when all tile movement costs are >= 1.
nodes.desc: Octile heuristic: `dx + dy + (√2 - 2) * min(dx, dy)` with unit cost = 1. Admissible when all tile movement costs are >= 1.

nodes.name: find_path
nodes.signature: fn find_path( walkable: &[u8], costs: &[f32], width: u32, height: u32, sx: u32, sy: u32, ex: u32, ey: u32, ) -> Vec<u32>
nodes.doc: A* pathfinder with octile heuristic and 8-direction movement. # Arguments * `walkable` – flat `u8` array, length `width*height`; `1` = walkable, `0` = blocked * `costs` – flat `f32` movement-cost array, same layout; `1.0` = plains baseline * `width`, `height` – grid dimensions * `sx`, `sy` – start tile * `ex`, `ey` – end tile Returns interleaved `[x0,y0, x1,y1, …]` pairs (u32) for the found path, or an empty vec if no path exists or the search limit is hit.
nodes.desc: A* pathfinder with octile heuristic and 8-direction movement. # Arguments * `walkable` – flat `u8` array, length `width*height`; `1` = walkable, `0` = blocked * `costs` – flat `f32` movement-cost array, same layout; `1.0` = plains baseline * `width`, `height` – grid dimensions * `sx`, `sy` – start tile * `ex`, `ey` – end tile Returns interleaved `[x0,y0, x1,y1, …]` pairs (u32) for the found path, or an empty vec if no path exists or the search limit is hit.
